name: Dallas Cowboy Tacos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage over medium heat until well browned; drain.
2. Stir in the onions and brown them as well.
3. Open a can of rolls and stretch the dough until thin without splitting or tearing.
4. In the wide part of the dough, add the sausage and onion mixture.
5. Place cheese on top of the mixture.
6. Roll the dough carefully, ensuring all open areas are pinched closed.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
